label: integer_value
note: Number instead of string — checks strict typing in JSON body

label: array_value
note: Array instead of a single string — wrong container type

label: object_value
note: Object instead of a single string — wrong container type

label: empty_string
note: Empty string — checks if blank is rejected/required

label: fullwidth_spaces
note: Full-width (U+3000) spaces only — Japanese IME; often missed by whitespace/trim checks

label: halfwidth_around_text
note: Half-width spaces around content — checks trimming

label: fullwidth_around_text
note: Full-width spaces around content — checks if trim handles U+3000

label: emoji
note: Emoji — tests 4-byte UTF-8 / surrogate pair handling

label: fullwidth_digits
note: Full-width digits (U+FF10-FF19) — Japanese IME; checks half/full-width normalization

label: long_string
value: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit. Aenean commodo ligula eget dolor. Aenean massa. Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus. Donec quam felis, ultricies nec, pellentesque eu, pretium abcdef
note: Long string (e.g. 256 chars) — length/overflow probe. Skill also appends maxLength-based out-of-range dynamically

label: no_value
note: Field present but no value. Query -> field=; body -> omit. Handled by Step 5 Special Value Handling

label: missing_field
note: Field key entirely absent everywhere. Tests missing parameter

label: duplicate_param
note: Send the parameter twice with valid value. Query -> field=valid&field=valid; skipped for body. Expected result is API-dependent
